forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. M1 DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. M+ Peer Value anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. M+ Dilution-adj penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods that produce values outside 0.1x–8x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
